docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GINTIS, OWEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNG-TAYLOR, MARGARET $501.00 PRINCIPAL, $73.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $574.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY FOR ACCURED INTEREST ON PLAINTIFF'S SECURITY DEPOSIT, AND AFTER CREDIT FOR $120.00 PREVIOUSLY PAID. COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF GINTIS, OWEN
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-03-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-01-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-11-2008 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT UNG-TAYLOR, MARGARET
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,251.00 FILED BY GINTIS, OWEN AS TO DEFENDANT UNG-TAYLOR, MARGARET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-01-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-01-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GINTIS, OWEN AS TO DEFENDANT UNG-TAYLOR, MARGARET
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (DEBTOR PAID JUDGMENT TO COURT). AS TO DEFENDANT UNG-TAYLOR, MARGARET
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $574.00 RE 22218 FOR TRANSACTION W0708B10D002 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO OWEN GINTIS, DOC 1921637298, WARRANT #38002597, DATED DEC-12-2008
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-17-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UNG-TAYLOR, MARGARET
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-01-2008 - JUDGMENT.
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR TRUST TAG#22218 BY DEFENDANT UNG-TAYLOR, MARGARET
JUDGEMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS, FILED. COPY GIVEN TO ACCOUNTING.
